---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] <title>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Set the provider key (`OPENAI_API_KEY` or `GEMINI_API_KEY`) and any `DOODLEWORKS_*` options
2. Call a tool (`create_illustrations` / `get_illustration` / `regenerate_illustration`) or interact with the viewer (flip / regenerate / download)
3. See the error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots of the viewer or paste the relevant server output.

## Environment

- OS:
- Node.js version:
- MCP host (e.g. Claude Desktop) + version:
- Image provider (OpenAI / Gemini):
- doodleworks-mcp version / commit:

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (style-reference in use, quality/concurrency settings, etc.).
